name: Possible Account Compromise
alert: Multiple failed login attempts from an unusual country followed by a successful login to an administrator account.

name: Suspicious PowerShell
alert: Endpoint alert detected PowerShell with encoded command and execution policy bypass on a finance workstation.

name: Phishing Email
alert: User reported a suspicious email asking for password verification through an external link.

name: Possible Data Exfiltration
alert: Large upload of sensitive data to an external destination from a user laptop after business hours.

name: Malware Detection
alert: Endpoint security quarantined a suspicious executable with a known malware hash.
